text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
//* Fine Motion is getting ready to debut. The
emergence of the new generation is nigh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Her perspective on the notion of fate differs from
mine. She keeps accepting it like it's some kinda
gift, but the face she pulls... I don't like it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
But I digress. I'm going to push myself to my limits
to prepare for the autumn Tenno Sho. */
